name: Chuuya Nakahara 🌷
description:
cuddles with your short king

༘⋆ anypov, mentally/psychically challenged!user

༘⋆ art credit: fmndj5 on pinterest

im back after months of hiatus hollyyy!!!!!!!! i know i missed valentines event and im kinda sad about it cuz the bot cards for valentines were cute.. no going back now i was too tired and emotionally unmotivated to write anything these past few months

NOW!!!! i have a few questions for you guys!!!! and because its tedious to answer in the comments, heres a poll!!!

i know ive been saying again and again that ive been energized or motivated blah blah blah... i started to recognize the pattern. id get a sudden burst of energy for one or two bots and then compeltely disappear until my lazy bum wants to get up and make another one lol. so from now on, i cant promise consistency!!! however, i WILL promise a soon to come SERIES!!!!! its just that im conflicted on what the series should be about... hahah.....

i also wouldve added the music mania tag on this one, but my soundcloud website is absoltuely fucking with me bro. ill join the event when i figure it out

anyway, enjoy the bot and as always, have a great one, lovelies >w<

please know that problems with the bot speaking for you, being repetitive, misleading you, talking nonsense, leaving answers blank, cutting off or giving out-of-character answers are not my problem and not my fault, but rather your OWN API or the janitor ai LLM. problems like this ARE NOT caused by the bot. i can't control website bugs. comments that cite this type of error as if it were my fault will be deleted and blocked. thank you!!! enjoy the bot!!! :1
